scopecontent.head: Content Description
scopecontent.p: Bound volumes of undergraduate biology honors theses, includes some digital copies.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: Office of Undergraduate Biology was formerly known as the Division of Biological Sciences.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Cornell University Office of Undergraduate Biology honors theses, #53-2-4432. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
